{"id":"project-LICHEN-iwa3","title":"Silent truncation of payload length corrupts wire protocol","description":"## Location
rust/lichen-embassy/src/sim.rs:96

## Description
Casting payload.len() to u16 silently truncates lengths greater than 65535. The full payload bytes are still written on line 97 via extend_from_slice(payload), but the 2-byte length field contains only the truncated value. The receiver will read the truncated length, consume that many bytes as payload, then attempt to parse rssi/snr at an incorrect offset in the remaining bytes, causing protocol corruption.

## Failure Scenario
Caller passes a payload of 70000 bytes. Line 96 truncates length to 4464 (70000 mod 65536). Line 97 sends all 70000 bytes. Server reads length=4464, consumes 4464 bytes as payload, then interprets bytes 4465-4468 as rssi/snr (which are actually payload bytes), returning garbage signal metrics and corrupting the frame.

## Category

{"id":"project-LICHEN-iwa3","title":"Silent truncation of payload length corrupts wire protocol","description":"## Location
rust/lichen-embassy/src/sim.rs:96

## Description
Casting payload.len() to u16 silently truncates lengths greater than 65535. The full payload bytes are still written on line 97 via extend_from_slice(payload), but the 2-byte length field contains only the truncated value. The receiver will read the truncated length, consume that many bytes as payload, then attempt to parse rssi/snr at an incorrect offset in the remaining bytes, causing protocol corruption.

## Failure Scenario
Caller passes a payload of 70000 bytes. Line 96 truncates length to 4464 (70000 mod 65536). Line 97 sends all 70000 bytes. Server reads length=4464, consumes 4464 bytes as payload, then interprets bytes 4465-4468 as rssi/snr (which are actually payload bytes), returning garbage signal metrics and corrupting the frame.
